name: Integrate with The Iconic and David Jones Marketplaces
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can expand your Australian retail presence by integrating with The Iconic and David Jones marketplaces, two of Australia's leading premium retail channels, significantly improving your multi-channel sales potential. This helps optimize your retail operations by automating product synchronization, inventory management, and order fulfillment across these major ANZ marketplace platforms."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Connecting to premium Australian marketplaces through the Crossfire middleware solution enables automated data flow between "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " and these high-traffic sales channels. When you implement marketplace integrations, you can expect improved seller ratings through automated order processing, reduced operational costs from eliminating double-handling, and enhanced revenue opportunities from accessing premium customer segments in the Australian and New Zealand markets."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppQ45EAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppQ45EAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage - 2023-07-08T135920.169.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We're pleased to announce two new integrations to Retail Express:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "David Jones - one of Australia's leading premium retailer brands and marketplaces"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Iconic - Australia and New Zealand's leading online fashion, footwear and sports retailers and marketplaces"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.retailexpressmedia.com/documents/sales/IconicDJIntegrationInformation.pdf", "children": [{"text": "Click here"}]}, {"text": " to download the Information Deck!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Extend your sales channels to The Iconic and David Jones using a new solution developed by Retail Express in partnership with Crossfire."}]}, {"type": "children": [{"text": "Sync products, pricing and inventory data to eliminate double handling"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manage order fulfilment to automatically update the status of orders to meet your KPI's"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automate shipping processes with powerful integrations such as Shippitor 3PL's"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Minimise your operational costs, to maximise your sales potential"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\tCustomise inventory and order allocation rules to suit your business needs"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Improve Seller Rating Metrics and search result positions"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Who is Crossfire?"}], "data-id": "who-is-crossfire"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Crossfire is a technology company that provides and manages API & EDI integration solutions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Having in-depth experience with the Retail Express API solutions, Crossfire acts as a middleware platform to connect and enable data communication and processes between Retail Express and various other platforms."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Crossfire provides a fully managed service, taking care of the technical setup and configuration of EDI, ongoing monitoring and issue resolution, hosting, backups, and security."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text":
